case_title: JOANN BRYCE VS. SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA, COUNTY OF SAN

MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-03-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-03-2014 IN DEPT. 611. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE THE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE THE FORM OF ORDER. VISITING JUDGE: LYNN O'MALLEY TAYLOR, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, NOT REPORTED. (LOT/611)

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE JUDGMENT - JUDGE MILLER IS RECUSED. PER ORDER OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE, THIS MOTION WILL BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 611 BEFORE JUDGE O'MALLEY TAYLOR ON THE SAME DATE AND TIME. THE COURT WILL NOT PROVIDE A COURT REPORTER FOR THIS HEARING. IF ANY PARTY WISHES A REPORTER, THE PARTIES MUST MEET AND CONFER AND AGREE ON A SINGLE REPORTER. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Set Aside And Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-03-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER's Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Judgment - Judge Miller is recused. Per order of the Presiding Judge, this motion will be heard in Department 611 before Judge O'Malley Taylor on the same date and time. The court will not provide a court reporter for this hearing. If any party wishes a reporter, the parties must meet and confer and agree on a single reporter. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

State Labor Commissioner'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-03-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: The State Labor Commissioner's unopposed motion to set aside and vacate the judgment is granted. The prevailing party is to prepare the form of order. Visiting Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Not Reported. (LOT/611)
